summary: The diff implements most of the required features including Internet Identity authentication, backend data models, match simulation, IPL/BBL/Domestic tournaments, dashboard, match simulation screen, and cricket-themed UI. However, several specific acceptance criteria appear to be missing or only partially implemented based on the available evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend exposes a query to list all teams and fetch team details by ID
missing_requirements.reason: The backend main.mo is truncated and frontend useQueries.ts has getAllTeams but no getTeamById hook is visible. The AC requires fetching team details by ID specifically.

missing_requirements.requirement: Test format simulates up to 2 innings per team over a match
missing_requirements.reason: The matchSimulator.ts is truncated and main.mo is truncated. The MatchFormat type includes #test but no evidence of a 2-innings-per-team Test match simulation flow is visible in the diff. The InternationalMatch page is omitted from the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Qualifier 1, Eliminator, Qualifier 2, Final knockout rounds for IPL
missing_requirements.reason: The IPLTournament.tsx file is omitted from the diff due to limits. There is no visible evidence of the specific IPL knockout format (Qualifier 1, Eliminator, Qualifier 2, Final) being implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Points table tracks net run rate accurately
missing_requirements.reason: TournamentPointsTable.tsx computes NRR using a simplified fixed increment (+0.5 for win, -0.3 for loss) rather than actual run rate differential calculation, which does not satisfy accurate NRR tracking.

missing_requirements.requirement: Points table tracks net run rate accurately for BBL
missing_requirements.reason: Same simplified NRR calculation issue applies to BBL tournament standings via the shared TournamentPointsTable component.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fall of wickets displayed in the match simulation scorecard
missing_requirements.reason: The Scorecard.tsx component displays current batsmen, bowler, score, and overs but does not show a fall of wickets section.

hallucinated_features.description: Profile setup modal requiring users to enter a display name before playing
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a user profile setup flow or requiring a display name. This ProfileSetupModal is an extra feature not specified in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: caffeine.ai attribution link in the footer
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any attribution or branding for caffeine.ai in the footer.
